title: Unit 01s Roar
wikitext:
[]: Unit 01's Roar...             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Fri Feb 22, 2013 6:28 pm As anyone who watched the series will know, Unit 01's roar is absolutely horrific . I found out, thanks to TV Tropes, that the hideous, psychotic moaning we hear is actually Megumi Hayashibara's screaming slowed down. Has anyone tried speeding up Unit 01's roar to hear what it originally sounded like? I'm interested to find out how it sounded before the editing. Megumi Hayashibara, with her soft, sweet voice, isn't someone I would think of when I think of the voice for "hideous, monstrous cyborg abomination"... Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Sat Feb 23, 2013 2:33 am Nope, but I can tell you this. Unit-01's roar is actually counted as a voice track, so when they did the English dub they had to redo it. So unfortunately those who watched the Dub didn't get the awesome stylings of horrific cyborg roar via soft spoken VA... Well, we might have, I don't actually know what they did for its roar in the English.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Sat Feb 23, 2013 7:34 am Gets even more crazy once you realize that Hayashibara voiced Yui. Which means that the "psychotic moaning" you hear is actually Yui screaming in agony.

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Sat Feb 23, 2013 10:03 am amitakartok wrote: Gets even more crazy once you realize that Hayashibara voiced Yui. Which means that the "psychotic moaning" you hear is actually Yui screaming in agony.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Feb 23, 2013 11:35 am amitakartok wrote: Gets even more crazy once you realize that Hayashibara voiced Yui. Which means that the "psychotic moaning" you hear is actually Yui screaming in agony.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Feb 23, 2013 12:13 pm amitakartok wrote: Gets even more crazy once you realize that Hayashibara voiced Yui. Which means that the "psychotic moaning" you hear is actually Yui screaming in agony.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sun Feb 24, 2013 11:17 pm You could probably make an Angel noise by slowing down Shinji's screaming.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 25, 2013 1:00 pm Clover wrote: You could probably make an Angel noise by slowing down Shinji's screaming.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Feb 25, 2013 1:23 pm I tried speeding up the roar in VLC, but unfortunately the built-in speed slider doesn't alter the pitch.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Feb 25, 2013 1:40 pm riffraff11235 wrote: I tried speeding up the roar in VLC, but unfortunately the built-in speed slider doesn't alter the pitch.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:16 pm Squigsquasher wrote: Can you get the sound file and use a program like Audacity to pitch it up?

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Feb 25, 2013 10:54 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: You can make any noise by slowing down somebody screaming. It's only meaningful if there's a point to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 25, 2013 11:31 pm Clover wrote: Well it'd be SUUUPER DEEP if Shinji fought an Angel that imitated his cries of pain.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Tue Feb 26, 2013 6:21 am Kendrix wrote: For my part, I keep picturing his reaction to this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue Feb 26, 2013 8:54 am I made this a while ago but I never got around to uploading it anywhere. http://www.mediafire.com/?7d1ubwjc7z7z6dv

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Tue Feb 26, 2013 10:08 am Rodeo wrote: I made this a while ago but I never got around to uploading it anywhere. http://www.mediafire.com/?7d1ubwjc7z7z6dv

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Feb 26, 2013 10:33 am Dream wrote: It does make me wonder exactly how he would take the knowledge that his mother might be/be inside the Evangelion. Or even worse, knowing that and having to get inside soon after. I think he would at least lose his lunch.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Feb 26, 2013 11:58 am Nuclear, if you're going to post 3.0 spoilers just label them "3.0 Spoilers." That way there's no ambiguity.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Tue Feb 26, 2013 2:31 pm Rodeo wrote: I made this a while ago but I never got around to uploading it anywhere. http://www.mediafire.com/?7d1ubwjc7z7z6dv

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Feb 26, 2013 3:03 pm CJD wrote: Nuclear, if you're going to post 3.0 spoilers just label them "3.0 Spoilers." That way there's no ambiguity.
